prerequisites.value: Goblin, worshipper of a sun- or fire-oriented deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** If the sun is visible, you can spend 1 round performing a wild dance. Starting at the beginning of your next turn, allies who can see you gain a +1 morale bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to half your character level + your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1 round). At 9th level, this bonus increases to +2.
